overall.description: A stationary first-person view looking up at a massive digital billboard mounted between two modern buildings in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The billboard displays a neon cityscape that glitches through an advertisement transition from 'Welcome to Paradise' to 'Night City', characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between commercial towers with large digital billboard

agents.ego_description: standing still looking upward at the digital billboard between buildings

modern building with horizontal louvers and glass panels
massive vertical digital screen displaying futuristic cityscape
neon-lit skyscrapers with light trails against purple haze

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady upward gaze between two modern buildings at a massive digital billboard displaying a futuristic cityscape. The left building features gray concrete with horizontal windows while the right building has a modern facade with ventilation louvers. The scene is quiet and devoid of pedestrian or vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between commercial towers with glitching digital billboard

events.description: digital billboard content changes to display 'Welcome to Paradise' advertisement with yellow triangular graphic
advertisement glitches and transforms, replacing 'Paradise' text with 'Night City'

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the digital billboard as it glitches through advertisement transitions

entered.detail: yellow text reading 'Welcome to Paradise' with triangular logo overlaying the cityscape

segments.scene_description: The digital billboard suddenly displays a 'Welcome to Paradise' advertisement with bold yellow text and graphics. The advertisement then begins to glitch and distort, digitally transforming the text to read 'Night City' while maintaining the cyberpunk cityscape background. The surrounding buildings remain static as the screen's artificial lighting brightens the narrow alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady upward gaze between two modern buildings as a quiet urban void transforms into a vibrant, glitching cyberpunk advertisement. It begins with a static view of a massive digital billboard displaying a futuristic cityscape, framed by a gray concrete building on the left and a facade with ventilation louvers on the right. As the scene progresses, the billboard suddenly shifts to a bold yellow Welcome to Paradise advertisement, casting a bright artificial glow across the narrow alley. The display then begins to glitch and distort, digitally morphing the text into the words Night City while the surrounding architecture remains still.
